title: asphodelus albus subsp. occidentalis
intro: Asphodelus albus subsp. occidentalis is a subspecies of the asphodelus albus plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the asphodel family native to the western Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of asphodelus albus subsp. occidentalis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and creams, and its roots are also used to make a medicinal powder.
